name: vistage-chair-toolkit
description: The complete toolkit for peer advisory group facilitators: meeting design with Chair run-of-show, issue triage and processing, tagged exercises, group-maturity curricula, one-to-one coaching, member onboarding, guest days, accountability systems, group composition, market-map building, Chair authority building, referral source briefs, referral activation, public trigger monitoring, stalled prospect revival, compliant public-web prospect signal scans, room-fit prospect research, source-specific outreach campaigns, story-bank objection handling, recruitment operating cadence, and scored sales coaching. Built for Vistage Chairs, EO moderators, YPO forum officers, and anyone who runs CEO peer groups.
